events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: commercial concrete placement, in-service, observed field condition is honeycomb from missed vibration. Need to diagnose fault. Honeycomb indicates inadequate consolidation/vibration. In-service means structure is already operating. Honeycomb can reduce structural integrity, expose rebar to corrosion. Risk likely high. Decision fail because non-compliant/defective. Component conditions: degraded, maybe failed? Honeycomb from missed vibration is a defect; if in-service and structural, could be degraded. Let's say degraded. Percent_complete maybe 100 since in-service. Value 0. Confidence high. Findings: honeycomb due to missed vibration, inadequate consolidation. Actions: inspect, engineer evaluation, repair/patch, possibly remove and replace. References ACI 301, 304.
